content_fingerprint: hugging face launches an appstore for agentic behaviors on 10 000 reachy mini robots hugging face has opened a dedicated app marketplace for the reachy mini robot enabling developers to distribute and install agentic behavior packs across a growing fleet of 10 000 deployed units hugging face has introduced an appstore style hub for the reachy mini robotic platform the company announced in a community blog post published may 6 by hugging face engineer and community figure clem the store is positioned as a distribution channel for reusable agentic behaviors task routines and perception action lo
